hud_day.title: Day Counter
hud_day.body:
What: The current day out of your total deadline.
Red text means you are behind schedule.
Tip: Use speed controls (Space/1/3) to manage time.

hud_day_progress.title: Day Progress
hud_day_progress.body:
What: How far through today you are.
Each tick advances time — actions and events consume ticks.
When the bar empties, the day ends and resources refresh at dawn.

hud_win_progress.title: Win Progress
hud_win_progress.body:
What: How close you are to winning the scenario.
How to increase: Spread rumors that shift NPC beliefs toward your goal.
Reach 100% before the deadline to win.

hud_goal.title: Scenario Goal
hud_goal.body:
What: Your primary objective for this run.
How to achieve: Craft and spread rumors that target the right NPCs.
Check the Journal (J) for detailed progress tracking.

hud_milestone.title: Progress Milestone
hud_milestone.body:
What: A notable achievement on the road to victory.
Milestones appear when your rumors have meaningful impact on the town.

recon_actions.title: Recon Actions
recon_actions.body:
What: Your daily budget for gathering intelligence.
How to use: Right-click buildings to Observe, NPCs to Eavesdrop.
Refresh: All actions replenish at dawn each day.

recon_whispers.title: Whisper Tokens
recon_whispers.body:
What: Tokens spent to seed rumors into the town.
How to use: Press R to craft a rumor, then choose a seed target.
Refresh: All tokens replenish at dawn each day.

recon_favors.title: Favors
recon_favors.body:
What: Tokens earned through successful recon actions.
How to use: Bribe NPCs to reduce their suspicion of you.
Earn more: Complete recon actions successfully.

recon_heat.title: Heat (Suspicion)
recon_heat.body:
What: How suspicious NPCs are of your activities.
Effect: High heat makes NPCs reject your rumors (-15% at 50, -30% at 75).
Reduce it: Use Favors to bribe NPCs, or lay low and wait.

speed_pause.title: Pause (Space)
speed_pause.body:
What: Freezes all game time.
Use this to plan your next move without time pressure.
Press Space again or click 1x/3x to resume.

speed_normal.title: Normal Speed (1)
speed_normal.body:
What: Standard game speed — 1 tick per second.
Good for observing rumor spread and NPC behavior in real time.

speed_fast.title: Fast Speed (3)
speed_fast.body:
What: Triple game speed — 3 ticks per second.
Useful when waiting for rumors to spread or resources to refresh.

speed_end_day.title: End Day (E)
speed_end_day.body:
What: Skips immediately to the next dawn.
Available when all actions and whispers are spent.
Use this to avoid waiting when you have nothing left to do today.

controls_panel.title: Controls
controls_panel.body:
WASD: Pan camera | Scroll: Zoom
R: Open Rumor Crafting | J: Open Journal
G: Social Graph | F1: Help / Tutorial
Right-click: Interact with NPCs and buildings

social_graph.title: Social Graph (G)
social_graph.body:
What: A visual map of NPC relationships.
How to use: Find well-connected NPCs for faster rumor spread.
Tip: Allied NPCs pass rumors more willingly than rivals.

rumor_subject_panel.title: 1 / 3 — Subject Selection
rumor_subject_panel.body:
What: Choose which NPC this rumor targets.
Their faction and reputation affect spread speed and believability.
Tip: Target NPCs central to your win condition.

rumor_claim_panel.title: 2 / 3 — Claim Type
rumor_claim_panel.body:
What: The kind of rumor you are spreading.
Intensity: How fast it spreads (high = faster but riskier).
Mutability: How much NPCs distort it as it travels.

rumor_seed_panel.title: 3 / 3 — Seed Target
rumor_seed_panel.body:
What: The first NPC to hear the rumor.
Well-connected NPCs spread it to more people.
Costs 1 Whisper Token — choose your messenger wisely.

rumor_whisper_bar.title: Whisper Tokens Remaining
rumor_whisper_bar.body: How many times you can seed rumors today. Each seed costs 1 token. All tokens replenish at dawn.

rumor_claim_intensity.title: Intensity
rumor_claim_intensity.body:
What: How shocking the claim is.
High intensity spreads faster but may be dismissed by skeptical NPCs.
Tip: Match intensity to your target's credulity.

rumor_claim_mutability.title: Mutability
rumor_claim_mutability.body:
What: How much NPCs distort the rumor as it passes between them.
High mutability means the story changes significantly by the time it reaches its target.

journal_rumors.title: Rumors
journal_rumors.body:
What: All rumors you have seeded.
Track spread state, believer count, and filter by status.
New activity is highlighted for easy scanning.

journal_intelligence.title: Intelligence
journal_intelligence.body:
What: Observations and eavesdropping data from recon actions.
How to use: Attach evidence to rumors to boost believability.
Gather more by right-clicking NPCs and buildings.

journal_factions.title: Factions
journal_factions.body:
What: The three town factions — Merchant, Noble, and Clergy.
Shows each faction's current mood and how your rumors shift their influence.

journal_timeline.title: Timeline
journal_timeline.body:
What: A chronological log of events, rumors, and NPC state changes.
Useful for spotting patterns and planning your next move.

journal_objectives.title: Objectives
journal_objectives.body:
What: Your scenario win and fail conditions with current progress.
Check here if you are unsure what to focus on.

journal_milestones.title: Milestones
journal_milestones.body:
What: Notable achievements unlocked during this run.
Each milestone marks a meaningful turning point in the town's gossip network.

feed_panel.title: Recent Actions
feed_panel.body:
What: A log of your last few recon actions and their outcomes.
Click an entry to jump to that event in the Journal Timeline.
Clears when a new time-of-day phase begins.

hint_button.title: What Next? (?)
hint_button.body:
What: Context-aware guidance based on your current game state.
Shows a suggestion for what to do next.
Great for new players or when you feel stuck.
